name: example-clone-linear
title: Clone Linear
description: Clone Linear's site — iconic dark gradient, glassy panels, motion feel.

description_i18n.en: Clone Linear's site — iconic dark gradient, glassy panels, motion feel.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 复刻 Linear 官网 —— 标志性深色渐变、玻璃质感面板、滚动体感。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 復刻 Linear 官網 —— 標誌性深色漸層、玻璃質感面板、滾動體感。

query.en: Clone this website faithfully: https://linear.app. Use the web-clone workflow — recon the site, harvest its real fonts and images, match its exact colors and scroll feel, then build a local clone. Keep the original assets; record trademarks/copyright in NOTES.md for me to replace.
query.zh-CN: 忠实复刻这个网站：https://linear.app。走 web-clone 流程 —— 侦察站点、抓取真实字体与图片、照抄精确色值与滚动体感，再构建本地复刻。保留原始素材；把商标/版权项记进 NOTES.md 交我替换。
